decision_matrix_markdown:
## Deployment Decision Matrix

Primary shape: `api`

| Rank | Strategy | Total | Fit | Security | Ops | Cost | Required Secrets |
| --- | --- | ---: | ---: | ---: | ---: | ---: | --- |
| 1 | GitHub Actions to Render | 86 | 94 | 75 | 81 | 70 | RENDER_API_KEY |
| 2 | GitHub Actions to Azure Web App | 82 | 89 | 82 | 71 | 60 | AZURE_CREDENTIALS, AZURE_WEBAPP_NAME |
| 3 | GitHub Actions to Vercel | 77 | 75 | 80 | 82 | 75 | VERCEL_TOKEN, VERCEL_ORG_ID, VERCEL_PROJECT_ID |
| 4 | GitHub Actions to Cloudflare Pages | 68 | 55 | 84 | 80 | 85 | CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN, CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID |
| 5 | GitHub Pages via Actions | 55 | 25 | 90 | 90 | 95 | None |

provider_shortlist.title: GitHub Actions to Azure Web App

recommended_strategy.title: GitHub Actions to Render
why: Strong fit for Python APIs, workers, and full-stack apps.
Python runtime signal aligns with provider workflow
Docker signal supports portable deployment packaging

rationale: Strong fit for Python APIs, workers, and full-stack apps.

strategies.title: GitHub Actions to Render

rationale: Good fit when enterprise Azure governance or App Service is desired.
Python runtime signal aligns with provider workflow
Docker signal supports portable deployment packaging
strategies.title: GitHub Actions to Azure Web App

rationale: Great for frontend-heavy projects and Next.js workloads.
strategies.title: GitHub Actions to Vercel

rationale: Strong static and SPA hosting option with global edge delivery.
strategies.title: GitHub Actions to Cloudflare Pages

rationale: Best default for static, docs, or slide repositories.
